title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Frontend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
